narrative_role: Atto II inciting incident. Il mondo della storia incontra qualcosa di nuovo.

prompt_components.shot_type: Wide shot, transition from a lookout figure to the horizon view
prompt_components.subject: The scene starts with a back-view silhouette of a lookout in a crow's nest pointing forward, then cuts to what they see: a mysterious island slowly emerging from a low fog bank on the horizon
prompt_components.action: the fog dissipates progressively, revealing the silhouette of an island with organic-yet-geometric formations — palm-like shapes that are too symmetrical, rock formations with clean architectural angles, and a single tall crystalline tower in the distance, all in muted blue-violet tones
prompt_components.environment: open ocean during overcast midday, low fog bank, the island lit by a slightly different cooler blue-violet light than the rest of the seascape — subtly indicating it doesn't belong to the normal world
prompt_components.camera_movement: slow zoom-in from a wide angle toward the island, never reaching it, ending at medium-wide
prompt_components.lighting: diffused overcast daylight on the ocean, but the island bathed in a slightly cooler, more violet-tinged light — suggesting otherness without being aggressive about it
prompt_components.mood: wonder, uncertainty, the sublime — like spotting Atlantis but with a calm scientific curiosity
prompt_components.audio_hint: complete silence for the first 1 second after the fog dissipates, then a deep low sub-bass slowly rising, distant ethereal chimes, no wind, no waves audible — the island absorbs all natural sound

acceptance_criteria: L'isola ha forme che suggeriscono 'tecnologia organica', mai sci-fi neon
La luce sull'isola è leggermente più fredda/violacea del mare
Audio: il sub-bass deve essere percepibile
Lo spettatore si chiede 'che posto è quello'
